name: zinput_joystick_init_device
description: zInput::DI_InitJoystickDevice enumerates the first joystick, configures DirectInput state, default axes, and acquisition.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?DI_InitJoystickDevice@zInput@@YIHPAX@Z at 0x471e40 still fails: 8 unmasked mismatches, 48 relocation bytes masked, 5 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 283 bytes, VC object symbol size 288 bytes.

Reviewed difference is final register-restore scheduling: VC pops edi before storing g_zInput_JoystickInitialized, while Binary Ninja shows the store before pop edi. The targeted smoke verifies enumeration, QueryInterface/Release, data format, capabilities flags, cooperative level, default axis property application, acquisition, and initialized state.
